title: Dictionary Object View Style Updates and ChatGPT Icon Removal
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the dictionary view to have clean icons and clear labels, so that I can navigate without confusion about hidden or experimental features.
description:
Style updates to the dictionary object detail view.

## Changes
1. **Remove ChatGPT SQL generator icon** — Customers expressed concerns about sending schema to GPT. Legal disclaimer needed before re-enabling. Hide the icon but leave the functionality code intact.
2. **Update refresh icon** — Replace with Bootstrap Icons `bi bi-arrow-repeat` class and apply `dtp-green` class for consistent color and hover styling.
3. **Dynamic label** — When on Dictionary view, label the home page as "Objects". When on Migration view, label it as "Scorecard".
acceptance_criteria: ChatGPT SQL generator icon is hidden from the dictionary view
ChatGPT functionality code remains intact for future use
Refresh icon uses Bootstrap Icons bi-arrow-repeat class
Refresh icon has dtp-green color and hover effect
Home page label shows 'Objects' in Dictionary view and 'Scorecard' in Migration view
ux_changes: Removed ChatGPT icon (customer privacy concerns), updated refresh icon to Bootstrap Icons with brand colors, and made the home page label dynamic based on active view.
implementation_notes: ChatGPT SQL generator hidden due to customer feedback during demos about sending entire schema to GPT. Legal disclaimer needed before re-enabling. Functionality code preserved.
comment_summary: Developer implemented all changes and submitted for review.
